instruction: Two issues on the signal icon: the base outline is wrongly tinted red, AND the red notification badge on top is the wrong color (purple). Fix both.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/signal.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #e63946" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9.348 14.652a3.75 3.75 0 0 1 0-5.304m5.304 0a3.75 3.75 0 0 1 0 5.304m-7.425 2.121a6.75 6.75 0 0 1 0-9.546m9.546 0a6.75 6.75 0 0 1 0 9.546M5.106 18.894c-3.808-3.807-3.808-9.98 0-13.788m13.788 0c3.808 3.807 3.808 9.98 0 13.788M12 12h.008v.008H12V12Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#a855f7" cx="104" cy="24" r="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/signal.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9.348 14.652a3.75 3.75 0 0 1 0-5.304m5.304 0a3.75 3.75 0 0 1 0 5.304m-7.425 2.121a6.75 6.75 0 0 1 0-9.546m9.546 0a6.75 6.75 0 0 1 0 9.546M5.106 18.894c-3.808-3.807-3.808-9.98 0-13.788m13.788 0c3.808 3.807 3.808 9.98 0 13.788M12 12h.008v.008H12V12Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#e63946" cx="104" cy="24" r="6" />
</svg>
